observations.summary: Aviel's rough, scraped raw voice in the source paragraph echoes the motif of emotional and physical rawness experienced by Dan throughout the narrative, reflecting internal struggle and vulnerability.

source_evidence.quote: "Where will you go?" Aviel asked finally. His voice was rough, scraped raw.

observations.target_hint: Dan's internal war between flesh and spirit, marked by physical and emotional pain, as described in the narrative context capsule and other chapters.
